negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_125
prompt: A dynamic outdoor gym video captures two individuals engaged in a stretching routine on parallel bars. Set against a lush green forest backdrop, the scene features a black rubberized floor and various exercise equipment, including pull-up bars and ladders. The person on the left, dressed in a gray long-sleeve top, black leggings, and sneakers, and the individual on the right, wearing a pink long-sleeve top, black leggings, and sneakers, grip the parallel bars with their hands and bend forward in a synchronized stretch. Their movements are fluid and controlled, emphasizing flexibility and strength. The camera maintains a steady medium shot, capturing the full range of motion as they hold the pose, highlighting the serene yet active environment of the outdoor gym.
